author: DiI0
content: Completed: rewrote skill/crossbridge/SKILL.md for v2 socket protocol — replaced crossbridge-request/crossbridge-answer + xb-target labels with crossbridge-client peers/submit/answer and event-driven semantics. cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo test all green.
